metadata.description: AI codes fast. Raven makes it think first. A plan before any edit, challenged from three angles, approved by you; root-cause triage for bugs; local hooks that block secrets, vulnerable libraries, and edits until the thinking happened. All on your machine. Zero telemetry. MIT.
